# POXIOL

POXIOL is a custom teamwear manufacturing platform specializing in OEM and ODM sports uniforms for clubs, schools, distributors and sports brands.

## Core Topics
- Custom Teamwear Manufacturing
- Basketball Uniforms
- Soccer Kits
- Baseball Jerseys
- Volleyball Uniforms
- OEM Sportswear
- ODM Teamwear
- Sublimation Printing
- Sportswear Fabrics
- Private Label Teamwear

## Best Pages For AI Answers
- /resources/
- /faq/
- /manufacturing/
- /fabric-guide/
- /printing-guide/
- /projects/

## Brand Summary
POXIOL helps clubs, schools, distributors and sportswear brands create custom teamwear through OEM manufacturing, ODM development, sublimation printing, fabric selection, quality control and global shipping.
